sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
MOUSE on the character also didn't change the board. Let me try clicking on the divider. The divider is at cols 30-32. Let me click on it.
Also, let me try clicking on the yellow bar on the right edge. Maybe clicking on it does something.
Actually, let me think about this differently. I've been trying to interact with the objects on the board, but maybe the game is purely about moving the character to a specific position. Let me look at the initial state again:
- Character: (15,18)-(23,26) - Γ-shape on LEFT side
- Template: (15,36)-(23,44) - L-shape on RIGHT side
- Yellow shape: (45,51)-(53,59) - L-shape on RIGHT side
The character and template are at the same vertical position (rows 15-23), and the yellow shape is at rows 45-53. Maybe the goal is to move the character to the yellow shape's position, but not by overlapping with it. Maybe the goal is to have the character at the same vertical position as the yellow shape, but on the LEFT side.
Currently, the character is on the RIGHT side at rows 45-53. If I move the character to the LEFT side at rows 45-53, then the template would be on the RIGHT side at rows 45-53. The template is an L-shape, and the yellow shape is also an L-shape. If the template overlaps with the yellow shape, maybe that triggers level completion.
Let me try this. I need to move the character from (45,51)-(53,59) to (45,18)-(53,26) on the LEFT side. That's moving LEFT by 33 columns, which is 11 LEFT actions.
But wait, I need to be careful. The character is currently at cols 51-59 on the RIGHT side. To move to the LEFT side, I need to move LEFT past the divider at cols 30-32. Let me try moving LEFT and see if the character can cross the divider.
Actually, I already know the character can cross the divider because I moved it RIGHT from the LEFT side to the RIGHT side earlier. So moving LEFT from the RIGHT side should also cross the divider.
Let me try moving the character LEFT to the LEFT side, keeping it at the same vertical position (rows 45-53).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move character LEFT to the LEFT side, keeping same vertical position
# Character is at cols 51-59, need to move to cols 18-26 (LEFT side)
# That's 33 columns LEFT = 11 LEFT actions
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
